files.patch: @@ -406,7 +406,7 @@ {"id":"brenner_bot-b2o","title":"TanStack Form: Upgrade Session Creation Form","description":"# Goal Upgrade the session creation form to use TanStack Form with Zod validation for better UX and maintainability. ## Background The session creation form (/sessions/new) has 4 fields: - Thread ID (required, unique identifier format) - Hypothesis (required, text) - Prior Beliefs (required, text) - Target Agent (required, selection) Current implementation uses native HTML form with server action: ```typescript
